item.name: Tiny Tortoise
item.description:
Will not carry you to an underwater kingdom if you ride on its back.

Use item to acquire the tiny tortoise minion.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]
item.tooltip:
What is that foul stench!?
It's like the inside of an
adamantoise's arse!
  -  Wood Wailer Sentry
item.specialactiondescription:
Reduces DEF of all enemies within range by 25%.
Duration: 6s

fish.guide: Not native to Eorzea, the first adamantoise to arrive in the realm is believed to have been mixed in with a shipment of dodo eggs from the Near East. Why anyone would import dodo eggs when there are more than enough of the birds living in Eorzea already is a mystery for the ages...but the whole affair more than likely involves a hungry Qiqirn.
